Home / Social Media Management / Postiz

Postiz — open source alternative

Ultimate AI social media scheduling tool, open source.

Strengths

  • Built with modern Next.js stack.
  • AI-assisted caption generation.
  • Team collaboration on scheduling.

Weaknesses

  • Younger project — features evolving.
  • Self-host has multiple services (DB, Redis, queue).
  • Some AI features gated on cloud plans.
License: AGPL-3.0 Self-host difficulty: 2/5 Hosted cloud option

Official site · Source on GitHub

Ad slot — OSS middle

Postiz is used as an alternative to

Buffer

Schedule social media posts across networks.

See all alternatives →

Hootsuite

Enterprise social media management suite.

See all alternatives →
